display.name: Hermes Agent
display.description: Hermes Linear agent app for delegated issue work and Agent Session events.

notes.webhook_phase1_alternate: Production webhook URL is webhook.whoasked.vip (cloudflared tunnel → linear-orchestrator :8645). webhook.edgars.tools is a future Cloudflare Worker target (edgars-hooks skeleton only stores events).
notes.webhook_requirements: Agent session events MUST be enabled. Backend must emit agentActivityCreate thought within 10s — see docs/Linear-Agent人類委派-新手版.md
